segments.text: I think there might be spots where you'd want to tech out though
segments.original_text: 掴み抜け 選択して みたいなところはあると思うんですけど
さあ モンキーフリップ

segments.text: Can grab with the cape there
segments.original_text: マントで掴めるところ

segments.text: Or on the ice platform, his shield's just way too fast
segments.original_text: もしくは Snow乗れば ガードが速すぎるだけ
この上 スマッシュ!

full_text: I think there might be spots where you'd want to tech out though Alright, here comes Monkey Flip! Can grab with the cape there Or on the ice platform, his shield's just way too fast Ah, I see Up smash!

corrections.original: スノー乗れば ガジェが速すぎるだけ
corrections.corrected: Snow乗れば ガードが速すぎるだけ
corrections.reason: プレイヤー名Snow、ガード反応の話
